title: Throwable Dirt
description:
Adds a projectile which when it lands, it places a dirt block.
(So you can throw dirt at a wall and hope it sticks!)
body:
Yep! You read it right! Your Wishes came true! This mod adds a projectile item called "Throwable Dirt" which when it lands, has a 50% chance of placing a dirt block where it was landed. Now you can throw dirt at a wall and hope it sticks!

How to craft!

![crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d3a8274a1257eb5912409f111d5ae66079a3129c.png)
